detaileddescription.para: Defines the prefix for MLSpaceResult codes.
Maximum size for the name of a Magic Leap Space.
There was an error communicating with the server.
The operation failed because the underlying service is not yet available, retry later.

briefdescription.para: Space is not available. This can happen when the selected space is in AR Cloud but the device is configured for On Device spaces or vice-versa.

Space is not compatible with the current OS version. This can happen when a space exported from an older version of the OS is imported to a device running a newer version of the OS. Refer to the documentation at the top of this header for more notes on Space compatibility.

detaileddescription.para: The operation failed because the Space being imported already exists in the device.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Magic Leap Space specific return codes.

detaileddescription.para: On device space.
AR Cloud based space.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Space type. Indicates the type of the Space.

detaileddescription.para: The device is currently not localized.
The device has localized successfully.
Localization attempt is currently in progress.
The device will attempt to localize after sleep duration is complete.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: The current localization status.

detaileddescription.para: Localization confidence is very poor and should be reattempted.
The confidence is low, current environmental conditions may adversely affect localization.
The confidence is high, persistent content should be stable.
This is a very high-confidence localization, persistent content will be very stable.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: The confidence of the current localization.

detaileddescription.para: No error, localization was successful.
Localization failed for an unknown reason.
Localization failed becuase the user is outside of the mapped area.
There are not enough features in the environment to successfully localize.
Localization failed due to excessive motion.
Localization failed because the lighting levels are too low in the environment.
A headpose failure caused localization to be unsuccessful.
There was an internal algorithm failure that prevented localization.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: A set of possible reasons that a localization attempt may be unsuccessful.
Magic Leap Space specific return codes.
Space type. Indicates the type of the Space.
The current localization status.
The confidence of the current localization.
A set of possible reasons that a localization attempt may be unsuccessful.
A structure containing settings for the space manager. This structure must be initialized by calling MLSpaceManagerSettingsInit before use.
A structure containing information about a Magic Leap Space. This structure must be initialized by calling MLSpaceInit before use.
A structure containing list of MLSpace. This structure must be initialized by calling MLSpaceListInit before use.
A collection of filters for Magic Leap Spaces. This structure must be initialized by calling MLSpaceQueryFilterInit before use. There is no support for filters at this time.
A collection of parameters to be used for localization request. This structure must be initialized by calling MLSpaceLocalizationInfoInit before use.
A structure containing information about the device's localization state. This structure must be initialized by calling MLSpaceLocalizationResultInit before use.
A structure containing callbacks for events related to the Space.

detaileddescription.para: This structure must be initialized by calling MLSpaceCallbacksInit before use. Application can unregister (stop receiving callbacks) at any time by setting the corresponding callback to NULL.

briefdescription.para: A structure containing information needed to import Magic Leap Space. This structure must be initialized by calling MLSpaceImportInfoInit before use.
A structure containing information about the imported Space.
A structure containing information about the Space export settings. This structure must be initialized by calling MLSpaceExportInfoInit before use.
A structure containing information about the exported Space.
Initializes default values for MLSpaceManagerSettings.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default values.

briefdescription.para: Initializes default values for MLSpace.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default values.

briefdescription.para: Initializes default values for MLSpaceList.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default values.

briefdescription.para: Initializes the default values for a query filter.

parameterdescription.para: The filter to initialize.

briefdescription.para: Initializes the default values for localization info.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default values.

briefdescription.para: Initialize default values for MLSpaceLocalizationResult.

parameterdescription.para: The localization result to initialize.

briefdescription.para: Initialize defaults for MLSpaceCallbacks.

parameterdescription.para: The callback structure to initialize.

briefdescription.para: Initialize default values for MLSpaceImportInfo.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default values.

briefdescription.para: Initialize default values for MLSpaceExportInfo.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default values.

briefdescription.para: Returns an ASCII string for MLSpaceResult and MLResult codes.

parameterdescription.para: The input MLResult enum from MLSpace functions.

simplesect.para: ASCII string containing readable version of result code.

briefdescription.para: Creates a Magic Leap Space manager handle.

detaileddescription.para: Application can create only one Magic Leap Space manager handle. Multiple calls to create a manager handle will result in a failure. The handle is valid for the lifecycle of the application.

parameterdescription.para: Settings that configures the space manager.
The handle to be created.
Failed due to an existing manager.
One or more input parameters are not valid.
Space manager handle was successfully created.
Necessary permission is missing.
Operation failed for unknown reason.

briefdescription.para: Set the callbacks for events related to the Magic Leap Space.

parameterdescription.para: Space manager handle created by MLSpaceManagerCreate.
Pointer to the MLSpaceCallbacks structure containing the callbacks.
Pointer that will be returned in the callback.
One or more input parameters are not valid.
The callbacks were registered successfully.
Operation failed for unknown reason.

briefdescription.para: Get the list of available spaces.

detaileddescription.para: The list of spaces returned will depend on the current device mapping mode. Only the Spaces associated with the current mapping mode will be returned by this call. Device mapping mode can be changed via the system application(s).
The list memory is owned by the library, call MLSpaceReleaseSpaceList to release the memory. Each get MLSpaceGetSpaceList should have a corresponding MLSpaceReleaseSpaceList.

parameterdescription.para: Space manager handle created by MLSpaceManagerCreate.
The filter structure for the query.
List of Spaces currently available to the device.
One or more input parameters are not valid.
List of spaces retrieved successfully.
Invalid authentication credentials for this operation.
Operation failed for unknown reason.
Operation failed due to server side error.
Operation failed because service is not ready.

briefdescription.para: Release the list of available spaces.

parameterdescription.para: Space manager handle created by MLSpaceManagerCreate.
List Magic Leap Spaces that needs to be released.
One or more input parameters are not valid.
List resources was successfully released.
Operation failed for unknown reason.

briefdescription.para: Send a request to localize to a given Magic Leap Space.

detaileddescription.para: This is an asynchronous request. Use MLSpaceGetLocalizationResult to get the results of the localization or use MLSpaceCallbacks to listen to on_localization_changed events.
A new request for localization will override all the past requests for localization that are yet to be completed.

parameterdescription.para: Space manager handle created by MLSpaceManagerCreate.
Magic Leap Space to localize into.
One or more input parameters are not valid.
Localization request was submitted successfully.
Invalid authentication credentials for this operation.
Operation failed for unknown reason.
Operation failed due an unavailable Space.
Operation failed due to server side error.
Operation failed because service is not ready.

briefdescription.para: Get the localization results.

detaileddescription.para: Returns the results of the most recent localization request.

parameterdescription.para: Space manager handle created by MLSpaceManagerCreate.
Contains the result of the localization request.
One or more input parameters are not valid.
Localization result was retrieved successfully.
Invalid authentication credentials for this operation.
Operation failed for unknown reason.

briefdescription.para: Destroys a Space manager handle.

parameterdescription.para: The handle to be destroyed.
One or more input parameters are not valid.
Space manager handle was successfully destroyed.

briefdescription.para: Import a Magic Leap Space.

detaileddescription.para: The MLSpaceImportInfo memory is owned by the app and the app should make sure to release the memory once the API call has returned.

parameterdescription.para: Information need to import the space.
Information about the imported space.
One or more input parameters are not valid.
Necessary permission is missing.
Operation failed for unknown reason.
Operation failed due an incompatible Space.
Operation failed because Space being imported already exists.

briefdescription.para: Export an on device Magic Leap Space.

detaileddescription.para: The MLSpaceExportOutData is owned by the library, call MLSpaceReleaseExportData to release the memory. Each MLSpaceExportSpace call should have a corresponding MLSpaceReleaseExportData.

parameterdescription.para: Information needed to export the space.
Exported space data.
One or more input parameters are not valid.
Necessary permission is missing.
Operation failed for unknown reason.
Operation failed due an unavailable Space.

briefdescription.para: Release resources acquired in MLSpaceExportSpace.

parameterdescription.para: MLSpaceExportOutData that needs to be released.
One or more input parameters are not valid.
List resources was successfully released.
Operation failed for unknown reason.
